channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: FCC Proposes Requiring Telecom Providers to Verify and Retain Identification Data for New and Renewing Customers
item.description: The U.S. Federal Communications Commission (FCC) is considering new regulations that would require telecommunications providers to collect and retain detailed identification information from all new a...

item.title: Carville Defends Maine Senate Candidate Graham Platner, Linking Controversies to Effects of Combat Service
item.description: Political strategist James Carville defended Democratic Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner during an interview with journalist Chris Cuomo, arguing that the controversies surrounding Platner should...

item.title: Moonlight Resources extends gold mineralisation at Clermont project and strengthens potential for a larger Queensland resource
item.description: Moonlight Resources has reported a new set of gold drilling results from its Clermont project in Queensland's Drummond Basin, with the latest assays indicating that mineralisation at the Leo Grande Ce...

item.title: CNN Commentators Debate Why Maine Senate Candidate Graham Platner Remains Popular Despite Controversies
item.description: A discussion on CNN turned contentious as political commentators debated the reasons behind Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner's continued popularity despite allegations surrounding his ...

item.title: David Ellison Reportedly Promises Greater Editorial Independence for '60 Minutes' Staff
item.description: According to reporting cited from The New York Times, David Ellison, chief executive of Paramount Skydance, has agreed to provide greater editorial independence to the CBS news program '60 Minutes.' T...

item.title: Democratic Strategist Criticizes Lack of Investigation into Epstein's New Mexico Ranch Under Trump Administration
item.description: A Democratic political strategist expressed outrage following reports that former New Mexico Attorney General Hector Balderas was instructed to halt his investigation into Jeffrey Epstein's Zorro Ranc...

item.title: Conservative Commentators Criticize Trump Administration's Limited Military Response to Iran
item.description: The article reports on reactions from several conservative and pro-Trump commentators following the Trump administration's decision to conduct what officials described as 'proportional' military strik...

item.title: RNA-guided CRISPR-Cas12a2 approach selectively kills cancer cells by targeting mutant RNA signatures
item.description: This study presents a new experimental gene-editing strategy designed to selectively eliminate cancer cells by leveraging RNA-guided CRISPR technology. Researchers focused on CRISPR-Cas12a2, an RNA-gu...

item.title: Historic Photographs Show the Important Role of Dogs During the American Civil War
item.description: This article explores the role that dogs played during the American Civil War and highlights a collection of historic photographs showing soldiers and their canine companions. While the war is often r...

item.title: Legal Commentators Argue Trump's BBC Defamation Lawsuit Could Expand Scrutiny of His Actions Related to January 6
item.description: A report by Raw Story highlights commentary from legal analysts regarding President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the BBC. The lawsuit stems from Trump's allegation that the broadcaster d...

item.title: Political commentator David Pakman criticizes Trump's remarks to reporters after NBA Finals appearance
item.description: A Raw Story article reports on criticism directed at President Donald Trump following an exchange with reporters after attending Game 3 of the NBA Finals. The article focuses on comments made by polit...

item.title: House Republicans Defend Trump's Remarks on Midterms and Americans' Economic Concerns Amid Weak Polling
item.description: House Republicans found themselves responding to controversy after President Donald Trump made remarks during a Cabinet meeting that drew criticism from political opponents and raised concerns among p...

item.title: Military Analyst Says Possible Deliberate Drone Targeting of U.S. Apache Could Escalate Iran Conflict

item.title: NASA Announces Artemis III Test Mission Crew Featuring ESA Astronaut Luca Parmitano
item.description: NASA has revealed the four-member crew for Artemis III, a revised mission that will no longer be the first crewed lunar landing of the Artemis program. Instead, the mission is intended to test key tec...

item.title: Johnny Depp's Turbulent Childhood: Rare Photos and Personal Stories from the 1960s and 1970s
item.description: Johnny Depp, born John Christopher Depp II on June 9, 1963, in Owensboro, Kentucky, experienced a challenging and unstable childhood. As the youngest of four children, he faced frequent family moves—r...

item.title: Paramount CEO David Ellison Assures '60 Minutes' Correspondent of Editorial Independence Amid Recent CBS News Staff Changes
item.description: Paramount CEO David Ellison recently contacted '60 Minutes' correspondent Lesley Stahl to assure her that the iconic newsmagazine program would maintain its editorial independence. This statement come...

item.title: Sen. Thom Tillis Criticizes Senate Republicans Over Internal Divisions and Support for Controversial Trump Programs
item.description: Retiring Senator Thom Tillis of North Carolina has sparked debate within the Republican Senate caucus after sending a lengthy 15-page letter criticizing fellow Republicans over their handling of key l...

item.title: Jasmine Crockett Challenges Alveda King's Interpretation of Martin Luther King Jr.'s Legacy During House Hearing
item.description: A contentious exchange unfolded during a House Judiciary Committee hearing focused on the Southern Poverty Law Center (SPLC), where conservative activist Alveda King appeared as a Republican witness. ...

item.title: Report: U.S. officials privately concerned Iran is rebuilding military capacity during ceasefire
